page: Microsoft Azure E20ads_v6 is an Eadv6-family virtual machine powered by an AMD EPYC 9V74 processor. Operating on the x86_64 architecture under the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this instance features 20 dedicated vCPUs derived from 10 physical cores with multithreading enabled. It is equipped with 160.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU. Storage is supported by a bundled 1181 GB local disk with Premium Storage capabilities, while no dedicated GPU hardware is present.

Performance benchmarks indicate strong single-core capabilities, with stress-ng single-core CPU performance ranking in the top 10% and Geekbench single-core scores in the top 25%. Multi-core performance and memory bandwidth largely align with average tier expectations. Notably, text processing and bzip3 single-threaded decompression perform strongly, placing in the top 25%. For machine learning workloads, the instance achieves top-tier performance in text generation for small LLM models, though prompt processing for larger models falls into the lower 25% tier due to the lack of hardware acceleration.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the E20ads_v6 offers a high-density memory configuration paired with substantial local storage, making it a viable option for workloads requiring large memory footprints without the overhead of high-core-count pricing. The combination of 160.0 GB of RAM, strong single-core execution, and local storage makes this server well-suited for memory-intensive databases, text processing pipelines, software compilation, and lightweight language model inference.
description: The Microsoft Azure E20ads_v6 is an Eadv6-family virtual machine configured with an AMD EPYC 9V74 processor running at 3.7 GHz. Built on the x86_64 architecture, it features 20 dedicated vCPUs across 10 physical cores, 160.0 GB of RAM, and a 1181 GB local disk. This memory-optimized instance delivers strong single-core CPU performance, ranking in the top 10% on stress-ng benchmarks, and strong Geekbench single-core and text processing scores. While multi-core operations and memory bandwidth remain average, the server excels in small-scale LLM text generation. Lacking a GPU, it relies on its high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU and local storage capabilities to drive efficiency. The E20ads_v6 is suited for memory-intensive databases, text processing, software compilation, and lightweight inference workloads.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E20ads_v6 is a memory-optimized virtual machine featuring 20 vCPUs, 160 GB RAM, and a 1181 GB local disk, delivering strong single-core performance for databases and text processing.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure E20ads_v6 is a memory-optimized VM with 20 vCPUs, 160 GB RAM, and 1181 GB local storage, ideal for databases and text processing.
tagline: A memory-optimized virtual instance featuring high-density RAM, dedicated AMD EPYC processing, and local storage for database and text processing workloads.
bullet_points: Powered by a 20-vCPU AMD EPYC 9V74 processor running at 3.7 GHz
Equipped with 160.0 GB of RAM and a 1181 GB local storage disk
Delivers top-tier single-core CPU and small-model text generation performance
Optimized for memory-intensive databases and text processing pipelines
Features dedicated CPU allocation with multithreading enabled
